title: Vibe Title En Surrealist Grandeur Master
sourceTitle: Vibe Title En Surrealist Grandeur Master Prompt
prompt:
{
  "vibe_title_en": "Surrealist Grandeur",
  "master_prompt": "A hyper-realistic, medium format photograph of The Protagonist standing dead-center in a perfectly symmetrical, overwhelmingly busy surrealist atelier. Shot on a Phase One IQ4 with a 24mm wide-angle lens, film stock Kodak Portra 160. The subject exhibits a 'Piercing Minimalist' narrative energy: an intense, neutral, stoic expression with absolute eye contact straight into the lens. The face is flawlessly illuminated with mirrored beauty lighting, capturing hyper-detailed skin pores and sharply focused irises. The subject is draped in an impossibly complex, architectural, multi-layered charcoal grey gown made of heavy wool and structured felt, mimicking grand brutalist shapes. The background is a dense, labyrinthine space of oppressive order, featuring a colossal, practical-effect sculpture of giant, cracked terracotta lips in deep organic red directly behind the subject. The surrounding environment is chaotically packed yet symmetrically arranged with towering matte-grey geometric pillars, hundreds of heavy brass chains hanging like dense metallic curtains, and scattered oversized glass perfume flacons reflecting the light. Deep Rembrandt shadows and high-contrast chiaroscuro emphasize the tactile, physical weight of the surreal practical props. Volumetric dust motes hang in the air. The image bridges surreal high-fashion with physical reality, exhibiting extreme optical sharpness and true analog film texture. NO NEON, no CGI, no plastic skin.",
  "meta": {
    "intent": "Artistic Portraiture and High-Fashion Surrealism",
    "priorities": "Absolute Symmetry, Tactile Textures, Oppressive Order, Piercing Eye Contact",
    "device_profile": "Phase One IQ4 150MP"
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect": "4:5",
    "composition": "The Grand Symmetrical Centering",
    "layout": "Subject dead-center, enveloped by an overwhelmingly dense and symmetrical background of oversized architectural elements",
    "camera_angle": "Eye-level, zero degree tilt, facing straight on",
    "tilt_roll_degrees": "0"
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "Female",
    "identity": "The Avant-Garde Muse",
    "demographics": "Ageless",
    "face": "Strikingly symmetrical, intensely sharp features with visible hyper-realistic skin pores and micro-imperfections",
    "hair": "Slicked back, entirely hidden beneath the structural collar of the garment to emphasize facial geometry",
    "body": "Elongated, statuesque, entirely concealed by heavy architectural draping",
    "expression": "The Piercing Minimalist: high-intensity, stoic, completely neutral",
    "pose": "Rigid, standing straight, forcing a direct and unwavering gaze into the lens"
  },
  "wardrobe_accessories": {
    "garments": [
      {
        "item": "Architectural draped gown with interlocking geometric folds",
        "material": "Heavy wool and structured industrial felt",
        "color": "Charcoal grey",
        "fit": "Oversized, sculptural, cascading"
      }
    ],
    "accessories": [
      {
        "item": "Thick environmental hanging chains",
        "color": "Aged Brass",
        "material": "Heavy oxidized metal",
        "brand_style": "Surrealist Haute Couture"
      }
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "A colossal, perfectly symmetrical surrealist prop-maker's labyrinth",
    "surfaces": "Cracked dry terracotta, matte grey concrete, heavy polished glass",
    "depth": "Extremely deep and layered, packed densely with towering pillars and hanging metallic curtains",
    "atmosphere": "Oppressively ordered, filled with suspended volumetric dust motes and physical weight",
    "lens_interaction": "Slight architectural stretching at the far edges due to the 24mm wide-angle, while keeping the center proportionately accurate"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "key": "Symmetrical front-on beauty dish lighting, fully illuminating the face",
    "fill": "Soft ambient bounce from the grey geometric pillars",
    "rim": "Mirrored dual rim lights outlining the subject's architectural garment",
    "shadows": "Deep, high-contrast chiaroscuro shadows carving out the dense background elements",
    "color_temperature": "Muted, cool cinematic grays contrasting with the warm, deep organic red of the terracotta (4500K)",
    "sensor_flare": "None"
  },
  "camera": {
    "lens_type": "Wide-Angle Prime",
    "focal_length": "24mm",
    "aperture": "f/8.0 to maintain crisp focus on both the subject and the intricate background layers",
    "focus": "Pin-sharp on the subject's irises",
    "sensor_format": "Medium Format Digital",
    "perspective_distortion": "Controlled, enhancing the grand, oppressive scale of the environment"
  },
  "post_processing": {
    "color": "Desaturated monochromatic palette punctuated by rich, oxidized terracotta reds",
    "tonality": "High micro-contrast with a classic cinematic film curve",
    "texture": "Authentic Kodak Portra 160 fine grain, emphasizing the tactile 'touch' factor of all surfaces",
    "digital_sharpening": "None, relying purely on elite optical glass sharpness",
    "chromatic_aberration": "Negligible"
  },
  "negative_specifications": [
    "Neon lights",
    "CGI aesthetics",
    "Plastic skin",
    "Digital painting",
    "Smiling",
    "Asymmetry",
    "Empty or minimalist backgrounds",
    "Shallow depth of field blurring out the background completely"
  ]
}
